input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.9.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.9.2.2
            TITLE: vehicle does not roll when tilted at an angle of 60° to the horizontal, corresponding to 1.7 g.

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.9.2.2: Vehicle does not roll when tilted at an angle of 60° to the horizontal, corresponding to 1.7 g.
IN.9.2.2 Vehicle does not roll when tilted at an angle of 60° to the horizontal, corresponding to 1.7 g.

final_answer: IN.9.2.2 Vehicle does not roll when tilted at an angle of 60° to the horizontal, corresponding to 1.7 g.
